fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer number the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.
The program copies the name from the Name 2 field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.
The program copies the county name from the County field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the country/region code of the customer the finance charge memo is for.
The program copies the country/region code from the Country/Region Code field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the language code of the customer that the finance charge memo is for.
The program copies the language code from the Language Code field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the currency that the issued finance charge memo is in.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you communicate with the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The content will be printed on the related document.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the general business posting group that was used when this finance charge memo was issued.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT registration number of the customer the finance charge memo is for.
The program copies the number from the VAT Registration No. field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the finance charge memo.
The program copies the reason code from the Reason Code field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date that the finance charge memo was issued on.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when payment of the finance charge memo is due.

fields.name: Fin. Charge Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the involved finance charges in case of late payment.

fields.name: Interest Posted
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether or not interest was posted when the finance charge memo was issued.
The program copies the contents of the field from the Post Interest field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Additional Fee Posted
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether or not an additional fee was posted when the finance charge memo was issued.
The program copies the contents of the field from the Post Additional Fee field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a description of the finance charge memo, such as Finance Charge Memo 95400.
The posting description appears on customer and G/L entries that were created from the finance charge memo.
The program copies the posting description from the Posting Description field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for this finance charge memo.
If you entered comments on the memo before it was issued, the program has copied these comments to the issued memo.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total of the remaining amounts on the finance charge memo lines. This amount is in the currency of the finance charge memo.
The program copies the remaining amount from the Remaining Amount field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Interest Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the interest amounts on the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the additional fee amounts on the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total of the VAT amounts on the finance charge memo lines. This amount is in the currency of the finance charge memo.
The program copies the amount from the VAT Amount field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user that is associated with the entry.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the issued finance charge memo.
The program automatically copied this field from the Issuing No. Series field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the finance charge memo from which the issued finance charge memo was created.
The program automatically copied this field from the No. Series field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the finance charge memo.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the issued finance charge memo header.
The program copies the source code from either the Finance Charge Memo field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code for the customer.
The program copies the code from the Tax Area Code field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Copies the value in this field from the Tax Liable field on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the finance charge memo header when the finance charge memo is issued.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date for the finance charge memo.

fields.name: Canceled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the issued finance charge memo has been canceled.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.
